# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

TrueTone Manager is a small menu bar utility. Security fixes are applied to the latest release only. Please make sure you are running the most recent version before reporting an issue.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| Latest release (0.2.x) | :white_check_mark: |
| Older releases | :x: |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please report security vulnerabilities privately — do **not** open a public issue for security problems.

Preferred method: use GitHub's [private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/martinrusetski/true-tone-manager/security/advisories/new) to open a security advisory. This keeps the details confidential until a fix is available.

Alternatively, email **martin.rusiecki@gmail.com** with:

- A description of the vulnerability and its impact
- Steps to reproduce
- The version of TrueTone Manager and your macOS version
- Any relevant logs, screenshots, or proof-of-concept

### What to expect

- I aim to acknowledge your report within **7 days**.
- I will investigate and keep you updated on progress.
- Once a fix is released, I will credit you in the release notes unless you prefer to remain anonymous.

Thank you for helping keep TrueTone Manager and its users safe.
